ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the original image file */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to the thumbnail image */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "page_no" INTEGER /* Page number of the asset */,
  "set_key" TEXT /* Key identifying the set */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production */,
  "written_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who wrote the play or script */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the production */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production */,
  "group_key" TEXT /* Group key for categorizing assets */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, video) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for file integrity */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was uploaded */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easier search and organization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the asset (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, external collaborator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the asset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "productions" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production */,
  "set_key" TEXT /* Key identifying the set of assets for the production */,
  "production_name" TEXT /* Name of the production */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the production */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the production */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the production */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the production */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Ticket sales for the production */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_productions_set_key FOREIGN KEY ("set_key") REFERENCES assets ("set_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the director */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the director's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the director's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the writer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the writer's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the writer's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment for nested comments */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the asset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the login attempt occurred */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the login attempt was successful */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the login attempt */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., student, faculty) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with this role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
